headline: NetApp (NTAP) Announces a Partnership with Elastio
summary: NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ:NTAP) is one of the 7 Cheapest AI Data Center Stocks to Buy Now. On March 24, 2026, NetApp, Inc. (NASDAQ:NTAP) announced a partnership with Elastio to integrate Elastio’s Provable Recovery Control into its Ransomware Resilience Service. The deal aims to improve cyber resilience by extending defense from production storage to recovery data […]

headline: Will Next-Gen HAMR & ePMR Drives Give Western Digital a Storage Edge?
summary: WDC bets on ePMR and HAMR to meet soaring AI and cloud storage demand, aiming for higher-capacity drives, stronger margins and data center growth.
